cases.name: gold
cases.diff:
diff --git a/ranges/__init__.py b/ranges/__init__.py
index eddc336..cfb35dd 100644
--- a/ranges/__init__.py
+++ b/ranges/__init__.py
@@ -3,3 +3,14 @@
 
 def length(interval):
     return interval[1] - interval[0]
+
+def merge(intervals):
+    if not intervals:
+        return []
+    out = [list(intervals[0])]
+    for start, end in sorted(intervals):
+        if start <= out[-1][1]:
+            out[-1][1] = max(out[-1][1], end)
+        else:
+            out.append([start, end])
+    return [tuple(x) for x in out]

cases.name: strict_overlap
cases.diff:
diff --git a/ranges/__init__.py b/ranges/__init__.py
index eddc336..5eaa4e3 100644
--- a/ranges/__init__.py
+++ b/ranges/__init__.py
@@ -3,3 +3,14 @@
 
 def length(interval):
     return interval[1] - interval[0]
+
+def merge(intervals):
+    if not intervals:
+        return []
+    out = [list(sorted(intervals)[0])]
+    for start, end in sorted(intervals)[1:]:
+        if start < out[-1][1]:
+            out[-1][1] = max(out[-1][1], end)
+        else:
+            out.append([start, end])
+    return [tuple(x) for x in out]

cases.name: no_sort
cases.diff:
diff --git a/ranges/__init__.py b/ranges/__init__.py
index eddc336..4c3840d 100644
--- a/ranges/__init__.py
+++ b/ranges/__init__.py
@@ -3,3 +3,14 @@
 
 def length(interval):
     return interval[1] - interval[0]
+
+def merge(intervals):
+    if not intervals:
+        return []
+    out = [list(intervals[0])]
+    for start, end in intervals[1:]:
+        if start <= out[-1][1]:
+            out[-1][1] = max(out[-1][1], end)
+        else:
+            out.append([start, end])
+    return [tuple(x) for x in out]
